reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena. No andaban los aires pero el resto bien.
Faltaba un poco de limpieza en los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good. The air conditioning wasn't working, but everything else was fine. The bathrooms could have been a little cleaner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc2FmVHZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del personal de ventas,los baños muy limpios é higiénicos,lo recomiendo para el paso durante el viaje por ruta nacional número 3

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the sales staff, the restrooms were very clean and hygienic. I recommend it for a stopover while traveling on National Route 3.

reviews.comment:
Recomiendo este lugar para cargar combustible. Muy  bien atendido. Baños.  Calibrado . Drugstore. A diferencia de la otra YPF SI te hacen DESCUENTOS CON LA FULL y si te suman puntos.

(Translated by Google)
I recommend this place for fuel. Excellent service. Restrooms. Fuel gauge. Drugstore. Unlike the other YPF, they DO offer discounts on full tanks and they do award points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURta1p2SmJBEAE
